A) 3-carbon molecule RUBP
B) 3-carbon molecule PEP
C) 4-carbon molecule PEP
D) 4-carbon molecule OAA
111. Enzyme responsible for primary CO2
fixation in Cs plants is- (Pg. 218, E)
A) RUBisCO B) PEPCase
C) Oxaloacetase D) Phenolase
112. Which of the following is true? (Pg. 218, E)
A) Cs plants lack RUBisCO
B) Mesophyll cells of Cs plants lack
RUBisCO
C) Bundle sheath cells of C4 plants lack
RUBisCO
D) Cj; plants lack RUBisCO
113. Primary CO, fixation occurs in Cs plants in
(Pg. 218, E)
A) Bundle sheath cells
B) Mesophyll cells
C) Any of the above
D) None of these
114. COs fixation in C4 plants occurs in-
(Pg. 218, E)
A) Bundle sheath cells
B) Mesophyll cells
C) Both A and B
D) None of the above
115. OAA forms other four carbon acids which
are transported. They are- (Pg. 218, E)
A) Malic acid and oxalic acid
B) Malic acid and aspartic acid
C) Succinic acid and aspartic acid
D) Succinic acid and glutamic acid

B) Calvin cycle
